summary: Iteration 129: Tested VR enhancements, Capacitor native scaffolding, and deprecated file cleanup. All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VR page at /vr has enhanced portal orbs with particle ring halos, translucent glass-morphism HUD panels, and color-coded journey/theater pickers. CosmicToolbar and SmartDock auto-hide on /vr route via HIDDEN_ROUTES array. Capacitor config at /frontend/capacitor.config.ts with splash/icon assets in /frontend/resources/.
